title: 200 TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs with 4 Folding Chair Dollies and Straps Bundle
features: Streamline your event setup with our 200 TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs, featuring 4 Dollies and Straps for hassle-free transport.
Perfect for large gatherings, these sturdy chairs ensure comfort and durability.

Our product bundle featuring 200 of the popular TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs, 4 Folding Chair Dollies and 4 2 straps is the perfect product combination that you need to make setting up or taking down a breeze at any event venue or social function.

TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding ChairWhen you buy our TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs in bulk, not only are you get getting free shipping, you're getting commercial-grade quality, party ready Samsonite chairs at a wholesale price.

Each chair contains UV protectants in its polyurethane, 18 gauge frame that is built to withstand harmful UV rays and boasts a robust static weight capacity of 683 lbs and a dynamic weight capacity of 250 lbs., while only weighing 6.4 lbs itself.

Our Plastic Folding Chairs feature a built in nesting design that allows them to stack neatly and securely as high as 50 on a dolly (like the one in this bundle!) or as high as you're comfortable with on the floor.

Lightweight, easy to move and even easier to clean; if you're looking for a folding wedding chair package then look no further than our TitanPRO™ Plastic Folding Chairs that perform long after the party is over.
Folding Chair DollyThis Folding Chair Dolly is the ultimate solution to preserve floor space while also making the set up and break down of events a little easier.

After a few minutes assembling the dolly, the 2 fixed wheels and 2 swivel wheels will have you and your employees moving in and out of tight spots like Mario Andretti driving through Monte Carlo While the 40 lb.

Folding Chair Dolly can carry up to 600 pounds, what makes it a dream to match in this bundle is the ability to carry 50 Plastic Folding Chairs each without adding any additional floor space that will be taken up.

At only 44'' long and 19'' wide, that's about the only space that'll be taken up on the floor, even with Resin Folding Chairs stacked on top!200 Plastic Folding Chairs and 8 Folding Chair Dollies might seem like a lot of product and even more storage space but it's actually no bigger your uncle's whirlpool.
That's right - if Uncle Bob can get a good soak in your storage space then that's all the square footage you need to house this party rental and discounted package that ships for free!

faq.question: Can I add more chairs to the bundle and get a discount on those chairs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add more chairs and qualify for the bundle discount. We recommend reaching out and asking for a quote!

faq.question: Do bundles take longer to ship than individual items?
faq.answer: No, all our products have the same ETA as long as they’re in stock!

faq.question: Can I get a mix of colored chairs within a bundle?
faq.answer: Yes, while this option is not available directly on our website, our sales team would be happy to assist you. Please contact one of our representatives, and we can create a custom bundle tailored to your needs.
